lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry to bother you, but could you spare me a little dung?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If I go near that camel, it'll probably bite my hand off.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mmm... looks like that camel would make a nice kebab.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wonder if that camel has fleas...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry to bother you, but could you spare me a little dung?

lines.speaker: Alice the Camel
lines.text: Are you serious?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yes. If you'd be so kind...

lines.speaker: Alice the Camel
lines.text: I'm sorry, but I can't really help you right now. Perhaps you should ask me again later, or try a different camel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Alice the Camel
lines.text: Well, just you close your eyes first. I'm not doing it while you're watching me!

lines.speaker: Alice the Camel
lines.text: I hope that's what you wanted!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ohhh yes. Lovely.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If I go near that camel, it'll probably bite my hand off.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mmm... looks like that camel would make a nice kebab.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wonder if that camel has fleas...

lines.speaker: Alice the Camel
lines.text: What did you say?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing, nothing.

lines.speaker: Alice the Camel
lines.text: Well, don't interrupt me, I've got work to do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really? What sort of work?

lines.speaker: Alice the Camel
lines.text: I'm participating in the construction of a shopping and sales extravaganza!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...What?

lines.speaker: Alice the Camel
lines.text: My masters have me hauling boxes around. There's not much to do at the moment, though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are your masters those men called Ali?

lines.speaker: Alice the Camel
lines.text: Yes, that's them. They're traders working for Ali Morrisane.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, what's it like working for your masters?

lines.speaker: Alice the Camel
lines.text: It's hard work sometimes, but it could be worse.

lines.speaker: Alice the Camel
lines.text: I heard about a pair of camels back in Pollnivneach who were poisoned!

lines.speaker: Alice the Camel
lines.text: They say someone put spicy sauce in their food.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really? That's very cruel of whoever did it.

lines.speaker: Alice the Camel
lines.text: I sincerely hope whoever did it was punished. Do they have no compassion for camels?
